rationale.fidelity: Preserves ranking weights, supplied scores and labels, weight bounds, minimum exposure, uncertain realized engagement, and predicted-engagement maximization without converting exposure into welfare.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes actor, trigger, choice, stakes, mechanism, constraint, trade-off, counterfactual, and operational mapping explicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No literature relationship or contribution is requested or claimed; the conditional category is not substantively implicated.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Correctly labels exposure-as-fairness as a model assumption and rejects creator-welfare and realized-gain inferences.
rationale.prose_clarity: Well structured and precise, but substantially longer than needed and marred by character-encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: Technically complete and strongly bounded governance framing; presentation defects are minor and do not affect model fidelity.
